calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-23-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for Court Trial/Prove Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.

Lien L. Uy, Esq., for the Plaintiff Li Hua Su.
Plaintiff Li Hua Su sworn and examined on her own behalf.
No appearance by Defendant Wai Yin Kwok.
After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
The Rental agreement is canceled. The Lease is forfeited.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 1907 23rd Avenue (bottom unit), San Francisco, California 94116.
Past-due rent $2,121.00
Holdover damages $1,248.68
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs $558.85
for a Total Judgment of $3,928.53
Judgment signed in open court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Nov-23-2015 Assigned To Trial Court
MINI MINUTES: JPT: Nils Rosenquest; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Li Hau Su is present.
Attorney Pamela Chung for the plaintiff.
Defendant Wai Yin Kwok is NOT present.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was no appearance by defendant. The trial date of NOV-23-2015 remains on calendar. (JPT/501)

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-19-2015 Text Ruling
